hero.headline:
Your Body
Deserves a
Custom Plan
hero.subtitle: Stop blindly following supplement trends. Through a 6-step intelligent assessment, precisely match your special population group and generate a 3-dimensional 28-day personalized plan covering supplementation, diet, and lifestyle.
hero.cardTitle:
Every person's nutritional needs
are unique

whyUs.label: Our Advantages
whyUs.title: More Than Supplement Recommendations
whyUs.subtitle: Every step from assessment to plan is tailored to your health

f1.title: Smart Population Matching
f1.desc: Based on symptom self-evaluation and health check data, precisely identify nutritional gaps across 12 special population groups — no generic recommendations.

f2.title: 3-Dimensional Plan
f2.desc: Supplement + Diet adjustment + Lifestyle changes, three dimensions working together to comprehensively cover your health needs.

f3.title: Evidence-Based Science
f3.desc: Based on Chinese DRIs 2023 and international authoritative guidelines — every recommendation is backed by evidence, no fear-mongering.

f4.title: Safety First
f4.desc: Conflict detection + medication interval reminders + clinical referral indicators. We don't replace doctors, but help you supplement smarter.

populations.label: Covered Groups
populations.title: 12 Special Population Groups
populations.subtitle: Everyone's body is different, requiring different nutritional strategies. Choose the group that best fits you for precise recommendations.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title:
Evidence-Based
Personalized Nutrition
philosophy.p1: More supplements is not always better. Based on Chinese Dietary Reference Intakes (DRIs 2023) and international guidelines, we develop precise nutritional strategies for each special population group.
philosophy.p2: We also detect conflicts between nutrients (e.g., Hashimoto's requiring iodine restriction while pregnancy requires iodine), remind about medication intervals, and suggest consulting a doctor when necessary.
philosophy.c1Desc: A person may belong to multiple special groups simultaneously (e.g., pregnant + vegan). Our algorithm automatically merges plans and detects conflicts.
philosophy.c2Desc: All plans include drug interaction notes and clinical indicators. We provide optimal nutrition advice under the premise of ensuring safety.
philosophy.c3Desc: Powered by large language models to generate 28-day personalized guidance, from daily supplement reminders to meal pairing suggestions.

cta.title:
Ready to Discover What
Your Body Truly Needs?
cta.subtitle: Complete the 7-step assessment in about 5–8 minutes. Based on nutrition science knowledge base.

home.dualSubtitle: Choose your path to personalized nutrition guidance
home.freeTestStep1: 7-step questionnaire: age, gender, symptoms, diet, lifestyle
home.freeTestStep3: Complete report: supplements + diet plan + lifestyle tips
home.aiChatDesc: Describe your health status, AI nutritionist real-time chat
home.aiChatDesc2: Based on nutrition knowledge base, no AI hallucination
home.aiChatDesc3: Context-aware follow-ups, deep-dive into your concerns

footer.disclaimer: This tool is for reference only and does not replace professional medical advice. Please consult a doctor for health concerns.

pcos.name: PCOS
pcos.desc: Inositol, Vitamin D, low GI diet strategy

diabetes.name: Diabetes Management
diabetes.desc: Chromium, magnesium, alpha-lipoic acid, low GI

hashimoto.name: Hashimoto's Thyroiditis
hashimoto.desc: Selenium, zinc, Vitamin D, gluten-free diet

nutrients.title: Nutrition Encyclopedia
nutrients.subtitle: Based on Chinese Dietary Reference Intakes (DRIs 2023), learn about sources, intake recommendations, and overdose risks for each nutrient.
nutrients.noResultsHint: Try a different keyword or category
nutrients.ulSafe: Not clearly defined (regular diet unlikely to cause excess)
nutrients.vitDNote: ☀️ Special Note: Limited food sources of Vitamin D
nutrients.vitDNoteBody: Vitamin D is primarily synthesized through skin exposure to sunlight, with few food sources. Recommend 15–30 minutes of outdoor activity daily, or Vitamin D supplementation under medical guidance.
nutrients.vitB12NoteBody: Vitamin B12 is found almost exclusively in animal foods. Strict vegans must obtain it through fortified foods or supplements to avoid deficiency.
nutrients.labNote: Data is for reference only; please consult your doctor for interpretation
nutrients.disclaimer: ⚠️ Disclaimer: Information on this page is based on Chinese DRIs 2023 and publicly available scientific literature, for educational and reference purposes only. It does not constitute medical diagnosis or treatment advice. Any use of nutritional supplements should be under the guidance of a doctor or registered dietitian.
